召唤玩家当士兵，统一三国，三造大汉。
日月所照，皆为汉土江河，所至皆为汉臣。
从此，全世界出现了一股天灾级势力！
钟会：刘禅，为何你如此凶残？
邓艾：这些人贪婪、卑鄙、无耻、下流之极！吾远不及也！
司马昭：这些士兵是怎么回事？为何吾百万大军，就是杀不完呢？！
同为大帝国、大苏丹、罗马帝国等势力，见到大汉旗帜，纷纷瑟瑟发抖。
玩家大军：“别废话，你们这些BOSS，统统亮出血条吧！”
他们抢武器、夺土地、善种地，还爆肝，甚至会氪金！
他们会思考、会谋略，自带干粮，悍不畏死无，心态超好。
苏子尘：“纵观全宇宙最优秀的士兵，除了玩家之外，我只想说，还有谁？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2of677790850e628d291696014debba073~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"生生化息","author_id":"","book_id":"7364034262615460926","book_name":"谁召唤的第四天灾，司马昭吓懵了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#906058","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1154人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7364034334619075134","read_count":"1154","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"745270"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"362","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,三国,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/96ea2ca1d096f7a7c9cbc320466f8c26~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779453689&x-signature=7eoYZXRa59iG%2Ff5DbyYVt03H8wM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"76423180012","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"51"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323204129237E604F293FB579FB70"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_cou
